title: UserConfig (.dotnet-ai-kit/config.yml)
description: Per-solution descriptor of the developer's tool preferences. Distinct from project metadata. Populated by the configure command's interactive flow per FR-016 (clarify Q4).
description-migration: Existing v0 code uses `ai_tools` (e.g., copier.py:1096-1100). The pydantic loader for UserConfig MUST accept `ai_tools` as a legacy alias and map it to `enabled_hosts` on read; on write, only `enabled_hosts` is emitted. The migration is one-way: writing `ai_tools` is forbidden in v1.

enabled_hosts.description: Subset of supported hosts the user selected. Determines which files init writes (per FR-016) and which checks the validation command runs.

retention.description: Backup-folder retention count. Matches feature 018's 3-keep rotation (FR-023).

plugin_version.description: Recorded at init time. Used by migrate to identify legacy artifacts that pre-date this version.
